posts.title: Controlling a LED segment display with a Raspberry Pi
desc: Segment displays usually require special circuits to control. Of course, you can manually light up each of the display's segments, but it's hard to display any useful data that way.
But what if we could control each segment using a computer?

posts.title: The first post
desc: Hi! This is the first post on my blog.
It's more of a markdown test, than a regular post.
